slots.words: Psalm twenty-two opens with one forsaken man dying alone —
slots.note: Close view of the lone, weary, sorrowful figure — matches 'one forsaken man dying alone'.

slots.words: and ends with every nation on earth.
slots.note: clip content QC'd full-res and in motion; matches its beat

slots.words: the song throws its arms open to every nation:
slots.note: clip content QC'd full-res and in motion; matches its beat

slots.words: "All the ends of the world shall remember and turn unto the
slots.note: clip content QC'd full-res and in motion; matches its beat

slots.words: and all the kindreds of the nations shall worship before thee."

slots.words: and people in nation after nation have turned to the LORD,
